experiences.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Analyzed over 3M+ policyholder records and 24 months of claims data across life insurance and annuity products to identify risk patterns and inefficiencies in claims workflows.
Developed reusable data pipelines in Python using Pandas and NumPy to automate data cleaning, preprocessing, and transformation, improving data readiness by 15%.
Wrote optimized SQL queries in Snowflake to extract and aggregate data, reducing query execution time by 22%.
Assisted in developing machine learning models using Scikit-learn for fraud detection and patient risk prediction, improving fraud detection precision by 35%.
Built interactive Power BI dashboards to monitor claims volume, fraud risk scores, turnaround time, and operational KPIs for leadership reporting.
Automated monthly regulatory and risk reports using Excel VBA, reducing manual reporting effort and turnaround time by 8%.
Participated in Agile ceremonies using JIRA and managed analytics-related user stories and reporting enhancements.

experiences.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Performed large-scale analysis of patient billing and claims datasets using Python and SQL to identify denial patterns, payment inconsistencies, and revenue leakage.
Applied Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) to improve claims processing workflows and reduce claim rejection rates by 12%.
Designed Tableau dashboards tracking revenue cycle KPIs such as claim processing time and first-pass resolution rate, improving reporting efficiency by 30%.
Used K-Means clustering to segment providers and payers based on claim behavior, improving claim approval rates by 18%.
Processed more than 1.2 million billing records using Apache Spark for large-scale distributed data transformation.
Developed AWS CloudWatch monitoring and alerts to detect data pipeline failures and anomalies.
Conducted A/B testing to evaluate new claims workflows, reducing claim denials by 15%.
Implemented HIPAA and CMS compliance standards including PHI encryption and role-based access control.
